name: Panko Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, but leave the tails attached. Wash them well in salted water until the water runs clear. Dry on paper towels.
2. Beat the eggs in a bowl.
3. Pour flour and panko onto separate pieces of waxed paper.
4. Holding each shrimp by the tail, roll it in the flour, egg, and panko mixture. Place on a cookie sheet. Repeat with remaining shrimp.
5. Refrigerate if preparing several hours in advance.
6. Heat oil in a pan to 350°F (175°C). Deep-fry shrimp until they turn light golden brown. Do this in batches if necessary to avoid crowding the pan, which prevents proper browning.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Cut lemon into quarters, then halve each quarter lengthwise. You will have 8 wedges.
9. Serve with soy sauce for dipping and lemon wedges on the side. Squeeze lemon onto shrimp or soy sauce as desired.
